visa_type_detail.name: Work visa (Partner of a New Zealander)
visa_type_detail.description:
Join your partner while they’re in NZ.
Work in NZ.
Study for up to 3 months.
Travel in and out of NZ.

visa_type_detail.name: Resident visa (Partner of a New Zealander)
visa_type_detail.description:
Live, work and study in NZ.
Include your dependent children aged 24 or younger in your visa application.
Apply for permanent residence after having this visa for at least 2 years in a row.

visa_type_detail.name: Resident visa (Parent)
visa_type_detail.description:
Stay long-term in NZ.
Live, work and study in NZ.
Include your partner in your visa application.
Apply for permanent residence after having this visa for at least 10 years in a row.

visa_type_detail.name: Visitor visa (Parent Boost)
visa_type_detail.description:
Visit NZ for up to 5 years.
Visit your children and grandchildren in NZ.
Travel in and out of NZ.
Include your partner in your visa application.

essential_apps.description: Digital identity service for accessing government services and online accounts.
Manage your Ministry of Social Development payments and services.
Public transport planner and real-time information for Wellington region.
Mobile banking app for ASB Bank customers.
Mobile banking app for Bank of New Zealand customers.
